case_title: CAMILLIA KEI SAOUAF VS. CHUN PANG TONY KIR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. [ORIGINAL HEARING AUG-29-24 AT 3:30PM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAOUAF, CAMILLIA KEI

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAOUAF, CAMILLIA KEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIR, CHUN PANG TONY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SAOUAF, CAMILLIA KEI AS TO DEFENDANT KIR, CHUN PANG TONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2024 - JUDGMENT.

DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM TO HAVE THIS MATTER HEARD TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
